-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

modules.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner
documentation:
This module provides the XMLTestRunner class, which is heavily based on the
default TextTestRunner.
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._DelegateIO
documentation:
This class defines an object that captures whatever is written to
a stream or file.

classes.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._TestInfo

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._TestInfo.test_finished
documentation: Save info that can only be calculated once a test has run.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._TestInfo.get_description
documentation: Return a text representation of the test method.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._TestInfo.get_error_info
documentation:
Return a text representation of an exception thrown by a test
method.

This class keeps useful information about the execution of a
test method.

classes.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult._prepare_callback
documentation:
Appends a _TestInfo to the given target list and sets a callback
method to be called by stopTest method.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.startTest
documentation: Called before execute each test method.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.stopTest
documentation: Called after execute each test method.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.addSuccess
documentation: Called when a test executes successfully.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.addFailure
documentation: Called when a test method fails.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.addError
documentation: Called when a test method raises an error.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.addSkip
documentation: Called when a test method was skipped.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.printErrorList
documentation: Writes information about the FAIL or ERROR to the stream.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult._get_info_by_testcase
documentation:
Organizes test results by TestCase module. This information is
used during the report generation, where a XML report will be created
for each TestCase.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult._report_testsuite
documentation: Appends the testsuite section to the XML document.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult._test_method_name
documentation: Returns the test method name.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult._report_testcase
documentation: Appends a testcase section to the XML document.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult._report_output
documentation: Appends the system-out and system-err sections to the XML document.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner._XMLTestResult.generate_reports
documentation: Generates the XML reports to a given XMLTestRunner object.

A test result class that can express test results in a XML report.

Used by XMLTestRunner.

classes.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner.XMLTestRunner

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner.XMLTestRunner._make_result
documentation:
Creates a TestResult object which will be used to store
information about the executed tests.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner.XMLTestRunner._patch_standard_output
documentation:
Replaces stdout and stderr streams with string-based streams
in order to capture the tests' output.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner.XMLTestRunner._restore_standard_output
documentation: Restores stdout and stderr streams.

methods.name: xmlrunner.xmlrunner.XMLTestRunner.run
documentation: Runs the given test case or test suite.
A test runner class that outputs the results in JUnit like XML files.
